title: Translational Genomics in Neurocritical Care: a Review.
author: Myserlis P Radmanesh F Anderson CD
content: S-EPMC7223188 PMC7223188 Translational Genomics in Neurocritical Care: a Review. Translational genomics represents a broad field of study that combines genome and transcriptome-wide studies in humans and model systems to refine our understanding of human biology and ultimately identify new ways
